label: dump:zlib-1.2.13
cmd: abicheck dump pkgs/ex_libzlib_1.2.13/lib/libz.so.1.2.13 -o snap/zlib_old.abi.json

label: dump:zlib-1.3.1
cmd: abicheck dump pkgs/ex_libzlib_1.3.1/lib/libz.so.1.3.1 -o snap/zlib_new.abi.json

label: compare:zlib
cmd: abicheck compare snap/zlib_old.abi.json snap/zlib_new.abi.json

label: L3:zlib
cmd: abicheck dump pkgs/ex_libzlib_1.3.1/lib/libz.so.1.3.1 --sources src/zlib --build-info src/zlib/build --collect-mode build --show-data-sources -o snap/zlib.L3.json

label: L3L4L5:zlib
cmd: abicheck dump pkgs/ex_libzlib_1.3.1/lib/libz.so.1.3.1 --sources src/zlib --build-info src/zlib/build --collect-mode source-target --show-data-sources -o snap/zlib.L345.json

label: L3:zlib
cmd: abicheck dump pkgs/ex_libzlib_1.3.1/lib/libz.so.1.3.1 --sources src/zlib --build-info src/zlib/build --collect-mode build -o snap/zlib.L3.json

label: L3L4L5:zlib
cmd: abicheck dump pkgs/ex_libzlib_1.3.1/lib/libz.so.1.3.1 --sources src/zlib --build-info src/zlib/build --collect-mode source-target -o snap/zlib.L345.json

label: L4+H:zlib
cmd: abicheck dump pkgs/ex_libzlib_1.3.1/lib/libz.so.1.3.1 -H src/zlib/zlib.h -H src/zlib/build/zconf.h --sources src/zlib --build-info src/zlib/build --collect-mode source-target -o snap/zlib.L345H.json

label: auto-noquery:zlib
cmd: abicheck dump pkgs/ex_libzlib_1.3.1/lib/libz.so.1.3.1 --sources src/zlib_q --collect-mode build -o snap/zlib.autoNo.json

label: auto-query:zlib
cmd: abicheck dump pkgs/ex_libzlib_1.3.1/lib/libz.so.1.3.1 --sources src/zlib_q --allow-build-query --collect-mode build -o snap/zlib.autoYes.json

label: L4+phdr:zlib
cmd: abicheck dump pkgs/ex_libzlib_1.3.1/lib/libz.so.1.3.1 --public-header-dir src/zlib --sources src/zlib --build-info src/zlib/build --collect-mode source-target -o snap/zlib.L4ph.json

label: L3-meson:freetype
cmd: abicheck dump --sources src/ft --collect-mode build -o snap/ft.L3.json

label: L345-meson:freetype
cmd: abicheck dump --sources src/ft --collect-mode source-target -o snap/ft.L345.json

label: L3-autotools-nobear:ffi
cmd: abicheck dump --sources src/libffi-3.4.6 --collect-mode build -o snap/ffi.nobear.json

label: L3-autotools-bear:ffi
cmd: abicheck dump --sources src/libffi-3.4.6 --collect-mode build -o snap/ffi.bear.json

label: dump:llvm-17
cmd: abicheck dump pkgs/ex_libllvm17_17.0.6/lib/libLLVM-17.so -o snap/llvm17.json

label: dump:llvm-18
cmd: abicheck dump pkgs/ex_libllvm18_18.1.8/lib/libLLVM.so.18.1 -o snap/llvm18.json

label: compare:llvm-17v18
cmd: abicheck compare snap/llvm17.json snap/llvm18.json --format json -o /tmp/scan/llvm_cmp.json

label: L4-castxml:snappy
cmd: abicheck dump pkgs/ex_snappy_1.2.2/lib/libsnappy.so.1.2.2 -H src/snappy --sources src/snappy --build-info src/snappy/_bld --collect-mode source-target -o snap/snappy.cx.json

label: L2L4-castxml-I:snappy
cmd: abicheck dump pkgs/ex_snappy_1.2.2/lib/libsnappy.so.1.2.2 -H src/snappy/snappy.h -I src/snappy/_bld -I src/snappy --lang c++ --sources src/snappy --build-info src/snappy/_bld --collect-mode source-target -o snap/snappy.ok.json

label: L2-castxml:zlib-C
cmd: abicheck dump pkgs/ex_libzlib_1.3.1/lib/libz.so.1.3.1 -H src/zlib/zlib.h -I src/zlib/build --lang c -o snap/zlib.l2.json

label: L2-castxml-cpp:zlib
cmd: abicheck dump pkgs/ex_libzlib_1.3.1/lib/libz.so.1.3.1 -H src/zlib/zlib.h -I src/zlib/build -o snap/zlib.l2b.json
